# Agriculture and Food Systems

## Precision Farming
Precision farming uses sensors, analytics, and automation to optimize field operations. It helps farmers apply water, fertilizer, and pesticides more precisely. These practices can improve yield, reduce waste, and lower environmental impact.

## Crop Disease Detection
Crop disease detection identifies signs of infection before damage becomes severe. It often combines field observations, imaging, and environmental data. Early detection supports faster intervention and protects yield.

## Irrigation Optimization
Irrigation optimization balances crop needs with water availability and energy cost. Operators use soil, weather, and crop-stage data to schedule watering. Good irrigation improves productivity while reducing waste.
